app_tagline: Import bank CSVs, auto-categorize expenses by keyword. Tax filing made easy.
about_description: Import bank or credit card CSV statements, auto-classify expenses by keyword matching, and download a category summary CSV for tax filing.
pain_point_description: Freelance tax filing is painful every year. Manually categorizing each bank transaction takes hours. Keyword-based auto-classification does it in seconds. Rules are fully customizable.
upload_prompt: Upload a bank / credit card CSV
no_file: Upload a bank or credit card CSV statement to get started.
mapping_required: Please select the Amount and Description columns.
rules_description: Edit keyword-to-category mappings. You can add or remove rows.
uncategorized_warning: {count} transactions are uncategorized. Add more rules to improve coverage.
download_summary: Download Category Summary CSV (for tax filing)
desktop_recommended: This app is optimized for desktop use
tax_guide_help: Enter your annual income to see the recommended filing method.
tax_rec_white_detail: For income under 3M yen, a simple white return requires minimal bookkeeping with single-entry accounting.
tax_rec_simple_blue: Recommended: Blue Return - Simple (100K yen deduction)
tax_rec_simple_blue_detail: For income between 3-10M yen, a simple blue return with single-entry bookkeeping gives you a 100K yen special deduction.
tax_rec_full_blue: Recommended: Blue Return - Full (650K yen deduction)
tax_rec_full_blue_detail: For income over 10M yen, a full blue return with double-entry bookkeeping gives you up to 650K yen deduction. Accounting software recommended.
manual_amount_help: Enter negative values for expenses, positive for income.
